characters.name: "They"
characters.description: "They"Gender:MaleHometown:DanvilleProduction InformationDebut Appearance:"She's the Mayor" "They"are a pair of boys who say, "You can't be T'd off once you've teed off." They were part of a gag whereRoger Doofenshmirtzsaid "You know what they say, 'You can't be T'd off once you've teed off.'" When asked who says that, he said, "You know, 'They.' Those guys over there."

characters.name: Don Adaded
characters.description: Don AdadedGender:MaleAge:AdultHeight:AroundDoofenshmirtz's heightNationality:AmericanProfessional InformationOccupation:ReporterAffiliations:DanvilleNewsProduction InformationDebut Appearance:"Night of the Living Pharmacists"Final Appearance:"Night of the Living Pharmacists"Voiced by:George A. Romero Don Adadedis an Action News reporter who works forDanvilleNews. He is cheerful and somewhat oblivious. Covering the incident, he stays happy and tries to talk with a pharmacist, despite knowing the risks of doing so.
characters.personality_section: He is cheerful and somewhat oblivious. Covering the incident, he stays happy and tries to talk with a pharmacist, despite knowing the risks of doing so.

characters.name: Clive Addison
characters.description: Clive AddisonGender:MaleAge:AdultProduction InformationDebut Appearance:"Nerds of a Feather"Final Appearance:Phineas and Ferb the Movie: Candace Against the UniverseVoiced by:Kevin Smith Clive Addisonis a special effects artist. Clive Addison isPhineasandFerb's special effects hero. He has worked on at least two movie franchises,Space AdventureandStumbleberry Finkbat. Throughout the Science fiction and Fantasy convention, all Phineas and Ferb want to do is meet him, but the war between Sci-Fi and Fantasy prevents Phineas and Ferb from every opportunity that presents itself.

characters.name: Agent B (bear)
characters.description: Agent BGender:FemaleNemesis:Dr. BringdownProfessional InformationOccupation:Secret AgentAffiliations:O.W.C.A.Personal InformationFriends:Perry the PlatypusOther agents of the O.W.C.A.Production InformationDebut Appearance:"Isabella and the Temple of Sap"Final Appearance:"Bend It Like Doof"Agent Bis a bear secret agent working for theO.W.C.A.. WhenAgent Pinkyheads out to get his mission briefing onProfessor Poofenplotz's hairspray scheme, Agent B appears in an O.W.C.A. elevator along with five other agents ("Isabella and the Temple of Sap"). She later attends the O.W.C.A. Christmas party ("Phineas and Ferb Christmas Vacation!"). During the chaos at O.W.C.A. headquarters afterMajor Monogramis fired, she is spotted shredding documents until instructed by Major-in-ChargeCarlto "go into the woods and... see what's out there" ("Phineas and Ferb Save Summer"). She is seen in the helicopter thatPerryandDr. Doofenshmirtzuse to escapethe zombie apocalypsethat the scientist'sRepulse-inatorhad caused, as part of the infected. She got knocked out and got hit in the storage room when the helicopter crashes. Sometime after the helicopter crashes, she is cured whenIsabellaactivates the water sprayer, although she is not seen following the strike ("Night of the Living Pharmacists").

characters.name: Agent D (dog)
characters.description: Agent D"Arf"Gender:UnknownHeight:Similar toAgent ONationality:AmericanHometown:DanvilleProfessional InformationOccupation:AgentAffiliations:O.W.C.A.Personal InformationFriends:Other O.W.C.A. agentsMajor MonogramCarlBoss:Major MonogramProduction InformationDebut Appearance:"Traffic Cam Caper"Final Appearance:"O.W.C.A. Files"ImagesAgent D with Agent O and Carl Agent Dis a dog, whose first name is unknown. Not much is known of it but it got first seen in "Traffic Cam Caper". It got injured, along with Agent O, byDennis the Rabbit, the rogue agent, and had its right arm/paw in a sling ("No More Bunny Business"). It was also helping Carl with a drawing of Dennis. Agent D was first seen in "Traffic Cam Caper". It got injured, along with Agent O, by Dennis the Bunny, the rogue agent, and had its right arm/paw in a sling ("No More Bunny Business"). It was also helping Carl with a drawing of Dennis. Agent D also appeared in "It's About Time!" sitting in the crowd with its nemesis at the Dr. Feelbetter Show. However, it turned out it was a trap. The agent starts fighting once they're freed. It made a small cameo appearance in "Phineas and Ferb Christmas Vacation!" at the O.W.C.A Christmas Party.

characters.name: Agent Double 0-0
characters.description: Agent Double 0-0Gender:MaleNationality:BritishProfessional InformationOccupation:SpyAffiliations:Inspector Initials'British Spy UnionProduction InformationDebut Appearance:"Elementary My Dear Stacy"Final Appearance:"Live and Let Drive"Voiced by:Damian LewisBrian Phelps("Live and Let Drive") Agent Double 0-0is a British spy working for theBritish Spy Unionwho gets assigned to helpPerry the PlatypusdefeatDr. Doofenshmirtz. He is a very skilled spy, but seems to make things more difficult than they need to, like spies do in the movies. He finds it unusual that he's being made to work with a platypus and taken aback by the lack of details thatMajor Monogramgives them to find Doofenshmirtz. Once they find Doofenshmirtz, the evil scientist traps the secret agents in platypus-sized traps and reveals his plan: to flyBig BentoDanvillenext to the main building ofDoofenshmirtz Evil Incorporatedto resolve his little wristwatch problem. Upon hearing this plan, Double 0-0 ridicules it, saying that Doofenshmirtz could just buy a bigger watch or a wall clock to solve his problem than wasting his time preparing to launch Big Ben into space. Unfortunately, Doofenshmirtz retorts at this by saying that picking through different styles from a store would be difficult for him, and that launching the landmark will be easier for him to do.

characters.name: Agent Double 0-0

Unfortunately, Doofenshmirtz retorts at this by saying that picking through different styles from a store would be difficult for him, and that launching the landmark will be easier for him to do.

characters.name: Agent E
characters.description: Agent EGender:FemaleNationality:AmericanProfessional InformationOccupation:AgentAffiliations:O.W.C.A.Personal InformationFriends:Other Agents of the O.W.C.A. andCarlBoss:Major MonogramProduction InformationDebut Appearance:"The Ballad of Badbeard"Final Appearance:"Bend It Like Doof"Agent Eis a bald eagle who works for theO.W.C.A.. Her base is supposedly located near wherePhineas's Grandparents live, as this is where her "nest" was located. She made her début in the episode "The Ballad of Badbeard". Agent E came soaring down afterAgent Pis unable to open up one of the secret passageways to his lair in the area. She then took Agent P to her nest whereMajor Monogramcommunicates to Agent P through a small TV hidden in one of her eggs. Agent E then put worms into her nest, confirming that she is female and that she is expecting the other eggs to hatch soon. She then drops Agent P off at the docks and isn't seen from again until near the end of the episode, where she swoops down and rescues Agent P and Candace, although she may not have realized this fromHeinz Doofenshmirtz's island, which had set to self-destruct. Like mostagentsin the series, the first name of Agent E is never mentioned.

characters.name: Agent H (heron)
characters.description: Agent HGender:MaleNationality:AmericanNemesis:UnknownProfessional InformationOccupation:AgentAffiliations:O.W.C.A.Personal InformationFriends:Other agents of the O.W.C.A.Perry the PlatypusProduction InformationDebut Appearance:"La Candace-Cabra" Agent His an O.W.C.A. agent who first appeared in "La Candace-Cabra". Agent H was at the animal sensitive training. He left because he is already an animal. He and other agents growled at Monogram for saying humans are higher species.

characters.name: Agent K (2nd Dimension)
characters.description: KangaborgGender:FemaleAge:UnknownHeight:The same as Agent KHometown:Danville (2nd Dimension)Professional InformationAffiliations:O.W.C.A.Production InformationDebut Appearance:"Tales from the Resistance: Back to the 2nd Dimension"Final Appearance:"Tales from the Resistance: Back to the 2nd Dimension"Agent KorKangaborgis the cyborg counterpart of Agent K in "Tales from the Resistance: Back to the 2nd Dimension". Most of Kangaborg's body got replaced with metal plating minus her muzzle and her left arm and leg. Her left eye color was red and her right hand got modified to a power fist.

characters.name: Agent K (kangaroo)
characters.description: Agent KThe Unnamed kangaroo.Gender:FemaleHeight:Taller thanPerryNationality:AustralianHometown:Possibly DanvilleNemesis:L.O.V.E.M.U.F.F.I.N.Professional InformationOccupation:AgentAffiliations:O.W.C.A.Personal InformationSpouse(s):Unnamed spouseChildren:The child is inside its pouch (seen on Christmas Vacation!)Boss:Major MonogramProduction InformationDebut Appearance:"It's About Time!"Final Appearance:"O.W.C.A. Files" Agent Kis an agent who works for theO.W.C.A.. The kangaroo was watchingDr. Feelbetterand got involved in the ensuing fight. ("It's About Time!") She was later present at the O.W.C.A. awaitingAgent P's return. ("Traffic Cam Caper")

characters.name: Agent K (kitty)
characters.description: Agent K"Meow".Gender:MaleAge:More than 5 (as ofPhineas and Ferb the Movie: Across the 2nd Dimension)Height:Similar to Perry the PlatypusNationality:AmericanHometown:DanvilleNemesis:Aloyse von RoddensteinProfessional InformationOccupation:AgentAffiliations:O.W.C.A.Personal InformationFriends:Other agents of the O.W.C.A.Boss:Major MonogramProduction InformationDebut Appearance:"Traffic Cam Caper"Final Appearance:"O.W.C.A. Files"Agent K, also calledAgent Kitty, is a golden brown tabby with brown stripes, paler chest/belly, and green eyes. His first name is unknown; not much is shown of him but he was seen in "Traffic Cam Caper". In mindless animal mode, Agent Kitty is sleeker and his eyes are bigger.
